notes: Self-contained ChatML SFT dataset for the eliza-1-0_6b base. ~1.6k rows, ~0.75 MB total — small curated set, no real user PII (privacy filter ran; see manifest.json::privacy_filter).
Hashes above are the committed files at build time (seed 20260511). If the FINETUNE agent #45 re-runs the builder, regenerate this manifest with scripts/build_eliza1_sft_0_6b.py and re-hash.

Existing publisher scripts/publish_dataset_to_hf.py is wired to data/final/; this dataset is small enough to push under `sft/0_6b/` in `elizaos/eliza-1-training` or by adding an `eliza1-sft-0_6b` bundle to that script's allowlist.
